# SpaceX IPO Tracker

> A single-page tracker for the SpaceX initial public offering. It surfaces the IPO date, per-share price, ticker, a live status indicator, a timeline of milestones, links to SEC filings and secondary-market data, and on-device reminder mechanisms (.ics calendar download with VALARM blocks, browser notifications). Not affiliated with SpaceX.

## Current status (post-IPO)

- **IPO date:** Priced June 11, 2026 — first trade June 12, 2026 on Nasdaq.
- **Offer price:** $135 per share (fixed, per the 424B4 final prospectus).
- **Ticker:** $SPCX on Nasdaq (officially confirmed in the May 20 S-1).
- **Valuation:** ~$1.77T post-money at the IPO price.
- **Size:** 555.6M primary shares + 83.33M underwriter greenshoe option = $75B–$86.2B raised.
- **Filing trail:** Confidential DRS March 30, DRS/A May 7, public S-1 May 20, two S-1/A amendments (June 1 + June 3), 8-A12B Nasdaq listing form June 10, EFFECT notice June 11, 424B4 final prospectus June 12 — all under CIK 1181412 (Space Exploration Technologies Corp.).

## Constraints

- Static site hosted on GitHub Pages, no backend. No SMS or email is ever sent. Reminder delivery is via the downloaded .ics file (native phone/desktop alarms) and browser notifications (while a tab or installed PWA is open).
- Not investment advice. All figures sourced from public SEC filings and reporting (Bloomberg, CNBC, Reuters, WSJ, Motley Fool, Hiive, Forge).

## Source

- Live: https://spacex.bookhockeys.com/
